source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain, pre-1928)
title: Aerial view of Haines, location of Fort Seward
description: A circa-1900 elevated view of Haines, Alaska showing the early town along Portage Cove, the first wharf extending into Lynn Canal, and the site where Fort William H. Seward would be completed in 1904. The Chilkat Range dominates the horizon.
alt: Circa-1900 elevated view of Haines, Alaska showing the early waterfront and the site of Fort Seward
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-11 — downloaded from loc.gov storage-services (ppmsc 02221) and visually confirmed
